name: sajtmaskin-preview-host
description: Isolated preview-host prototype for stateful preview sessions.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/runtime.js && node --check src/store.js && node --check src/validate.js && node --check src/prewarm-leases.js
scripts.test:guards: node scripts/test-runtime-guards.mjs && node scripts/test-prewarm-guards.mjs && npm run test:proxy-contract
